meta.tagline: Where your beauty journey begins, and confidence shines through every strand and nail.

seo.title: Styling Betty | Luxury Hair, Color & Nail Studio in Miami
seo.description: A private Miami beauty studio where one stylist designs your hair color, nail design, and event look with you — so you walk out unmistakably yourself. Book today.

sections.headline: Your beauty, designed with you
sections.subhead: One trusted stylist for your nails, hair color, and the finishing touch — private, unrushed, and unmistakably you.

image.alt: A bridal half-up hairstyle with soft waves and a sparkling crystal hairpiece, styled at Styling Betty in Miami

sections.heading: You shouldn't have to settle for "close enough"
items: The rushed chair that hands you a look that isn't quite you.
The pre-event panic of trusting your big day to a salon that doesn't really listen.

sections.heading: What you get with Styling Betty

items.title: Hair color that's actually yours
items.body: Designed for your skin, your style, and your hair — dimension, gloss, or a change you've been picturing.

items.title: Nail design you'll want to show off
items.body: A manicure or pedicure that feels custom, never copy-pasted — including hand-painted art and detail work.

items.title: Event & bridal styling, head to finish
items.body: Glowing and camera-ready for the day you can't redo — hair and the finishing touches, planned around your moment.

sections.heading: One stylist who actually listens
sections.empathy: You deserve to be heard before anyone picks up a brush. Whether it's your wedding, your event, or a Tuesday you just want to feel good — your look should feel like you.

image.alt: A Styling Betty client with a glossy blowout and soft natural glam, smiling in the Miami studio

steps.title: Message Betty
steps.body: Call or WhatsApp (786) 227-1350 and tell her about your day.

steps.title: Design it together
steps.body: She plans the look with you — and you approve the direction as she works.

steps.title: Leave unmistakably yourself
steps.body: Polished, confident, and ready to be seen.

items.title: Bridal & event hair
items.body: Updos and styling for the days that matter most.

items.title: Color transformations
items.body: Dimension, gloss, and change designed around you.

sections.heading: Personalized, by appointment
sections.body: Every appointment is private and built around you — your look, your pace. Pricing depends on what you're after, so the quickest way is a call or WhatsApp message to the studio.

seo.title: Services | Hair, Color, Nails & Bridal — Styling Betty Miami
seo.description: Hair color, cut & styling, custom nail design, and event & bridal looks — designed with you by one Miami stylist. See what Styling Betty can do for your look.
seo.h1: What Styling Betty does for your look

sections.headline: What Styling Betty does for your look
sections.subhead: Every service starts the same way — listening to what you actually want.

image.alt: Long hair with a fresh glossy color and a smooth blowout finished at Styling Betty in Miami

items.title: Hair color that's actually yours
items.body: Balayage, all-over color, gray blending, and color correction — designed for your skin and your style.

items.title: Cut, style & finish
items.body: Precision cuts, smoothing and keratin treatments, and blowouts that keep "I love my hair" going between events.

items.title: Nail design you'll show off
items.body: Gel manicures and pedicures, hand-painted nail art, and rhinestone detail.

items.title: Event & bridal styling
items.body: Updos, bridal and quince hair, and event glam — planned around your dress and your day.

items.title: Designed with you
items.body: You approve the direction as Betty works, so there are no surprises in the mirror.

items.title: An unrushed, private chair
items.body: Your time is yours, start to finish — no conveyor belt, no being passed around.

items.title: One stylist, your whole look
items.body: Nails, hair, and finish from the person who already knows your taste — and, as your moments come, color and nail upkeep on your schedule.

sections.heading: Ready when you are
sections.body: Tell Betty what you're planning and she'll take it from there.

seo.title: About Betty | Personalized Beauty in Miami — Styling Betty
seo.description: Meet the stylist behind Styling Betty — a Miami nail-design and hair-color specialist who designs your whole look with you, privately and unrushed.

sections.headline: Meet Styling Betty
sections.subhead: Where your beauty journey begins — and confidence shines through every strand and nail.

image.alt: A polished beauty portrait with rich burgundy hair and soft glam, representing the Styling Betty studio look

sections.heading: Beauty that feels like you
sections.empathy: Too many salons rush you and hand you a look that isn't yours. Betty built Styling Betty to be the opposite — a private studio where your look is designed with you, by someone who specializes in nail design and hair color and treats your appointment as yours alone.
authority: A real portfolio across hair, nails & glam

image.alt: A Styling Betty client with a glossy blowout and natural glam in the Miami studio

sections.heading: Come see for yourself
sections.body: Book a private appointment and let's design your look together.

seo.title: Book an Appointment | Styling Betty — Miami
seo.description: Book your private appointment at Styling Betty in Miami. Call or WhatsApp (786) 227-1350 for hair color, nail design, and event styling.

sections.heading: Book your appointment
sections.body: Tell Betty about your day — your event, your look, or just that you want to feel put-together — and she'll take it from there. The fastest way to reach the studio is a call or WhatsApp message to (786) 227-1350.

footer.blurb: Styling Betty — luxury hair color, nail design & event styling in Miami, by appointment.

flags: No street address or email published on source — omitted from NAP/schema (not invented); confirm with Betty.
No published prices — routed to phone/WhatsApp; no numbers invented.
No written testimonials supplied — Portfolio page of real work used instead of a fabricated proof section.
Palette + type are art-direction assumptions (no client signal): aubergine #3a1f33, champagne-gold #8a5f14, Cormorant Garamond + Jost — confirm with Betty.
Makeup/event glam shown (real portfolio) within event & bridal styling; source page named only nails + hair color — confirm with Betty.
About-page portrait (photo-33) is a styled studio portrait; not captioned as Betty herself (identity unconfirmed).
